notes:
metaSTORY 3.1.3 — image quality fixed + new step 5 (Render)

QUALITY (this is the big one):
- Removed the hidden clamp that silently forced every frame back to LOW quality on every launch. Your setting is now respected, permanently.
- Image quality is finally selectable in Settings (Low / Medium / High) — it was never in the UI before.
- New production defaults: 1792x1008 @ High (was 1280x720 @ Low).
- Scene continuity anchor is now a switch, OFF by default. It used to feed a generated frame back in as a reference, so shots 2..n were edits-of-edits and picked up that 'edited in GPT too many times' look. Turn it on in Settings only when you want continuity more than clean frames.

NEW — STEP 5 'RENDER':
- Every shot in one place. Select any set of them.
- Change the style in bulk or per single shot.
- Advanced (grain / halation / flare / handheld / crystal / motion / candid / imperfection) moved here from step 3, and now works per shot too.
- AI edit: attach a note to the selected shots and have the AI re-direct their prompts.
- Re-render everything you selected in one go.

UI:
- Frames no longer blow up on hover in the Board — you can finally delete shots from the top row.
- 'THE END' is now 'FAST TRACK' and a lot smaller.
